# ShareClick

> ShareClick is a free, open-source software KVM. One keyboard and mouse control
> both a Mac and a Windows PC over the local network, with clipboard (text and
> images) and file sharing built in. Every channel is end-to-end encrypted
> (X25519 + ChaCha20-Poly1305) and it runs LAN-only — no hardware, no cloud, no
> account. It is a free alternative to Synergy, ShareMouse and Barrier, built
> for the lowest input lag (~6 µs transport overhead).

## Key facts
- Price: Free (open source, MIT / Apache-2.0), unlimited machines
- Platforms: macOS and Windows
- Features: keyboard & mouse sharing, clipboard sync (text + images), file
  transfer, automatic screen-edge switching, mDNS zero-config discovery
- Security: end-to-end encrypted, authenticated by a shared passphrase, LAN-only
- Latency: ~6 µs transport overhead (UDP input path)
- Alternative to: Synergy, ShareMouse, Barrier, Input Leap

## Pages
Each page has a clean Markdown version (append/replace `.html` with `.md`), which
is the preferred source for machine reading.
- [Home](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/index.md): overview and downloads
- [Setup guide](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/how-to-share-mouse-keyboard-mac-windows.md): how to share a mouse and keyboard between Mac and Windows
- [What is a software KVM?](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/what-is-a-software-kvm.md): definition, how it works, software vs hardware KVM
- [ShareClick vs Synergy](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-synergy.md)
- [ShareClick vs ShareMouse](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-sharemouse.md)
- [ShareClick vs Barrier](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-barrier.md)
- [ShareClick vs Mouse Without Borders](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-mouse-without-borders.md): the Mac-capable alternative (Mouse Without Borders is Windows-only)
- [ShareClick vs Universal Control](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-universal-control.md): Universal Control for Windows (Apple's is Apple-only)
- [ShareClick vs Input Leap](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/vs-input-leap.md)
- [Pricing](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/pricing.md): free
- [Install guide](https://github.com/phun333/ShareClick/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md)
- [Source code](https://github.com/phun333/ShareClick)
- [Download](https://github.com/phun333/ShareClick/releases)

## Optional
- [llms-full.txt](https://phun333.github.io/ShareClick/llms-full.txt): the full text of every page in one file, for single-fetch ingestion
